Interface JSModernDocument

All Superinterfaces:
Document, JsonSchemaDocument, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
JS201909Document, JS202012Document
All Known Implementing Classes:
JS201909DocumentImpl, JS202012DocumentImpl
public interface JSModernDocument extends JsonSchemaDocument
